{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012333656448BB421F13A2655E"}"},"total":3168},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7597403763904807704","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"9.5分，看了太久的💩，都快忘了好书是什么样的了。真的是让我在中间不止一次的感叹写的好。首先是较新的世界观，至少不会让人感到千篇一律的厌烦。然后对于人物的刻画很传神，大部分重要人物都有自己的性格和感情，称得上是有血有肉，经常几句话就勾勒出一个鲜明的方面。然后剧情上有起承转合，有高潮，至少比大部分平淡的小说强的多。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768910010,"group_id":"7486442171579501630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"兴起而为，随遇而安。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0f+83Mo2VD9Hf6fpci0OCioqZCjmmGyTZo/0j++rhSw","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"1627692940658527","user_name":"淳淳的熊猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1627692940658527","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1776346516,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486442171579501630","book_info":{"abstract":"【这是一个癫狂的世界！】【克苏鲁向】【小心，本文带有极其强烈的精神污染，谨慎观看。】
某天，世界迎接来巨变！
所有的生物受到未知影响，发生异变。
甚至…不止是生物。
人类文明被迫龟缩于最后的十九座堡垒城市。
向各种各样的神灵祈求庇护与恩赐，在这绝望的世界艰难挣扎。
孟毅于一场仪式中来到这个世界，醒来后愕然发现：
“我…是神灵？”
开什么玩笑，哪有这么弱的神灵，搞错了吧？
来不及细想，很快，他便发现…
别管自己神不神的了…
这破世界，多少沾亿点邪门…
“搞了半天，破世界只有我一个正常人？
不行，我不能接受！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/67b0e43620e553db31eb064f0a01408b","author":"睡个饱觉觉","author_id":"","book_id":"7486442171579501630","book_name":"世界破破烂烂，邪神缝缝补补！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203040","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7486442244099031614","read_count":"84329","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1530701"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"679","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,克苏鲁,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3cb9aa64ded06e4c6f47eb8df5cefc3c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384213&x-signature=CtvL%2BNBY8lL0QrhsyuOqUTA3dRw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"96825458565","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"725"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323012333656448BB421F13A2655E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读77小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":23,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":21633,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":275911,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":9757},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594430300485763864","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"照例来点标签：诡异风，容易掉san（看个人），精神状态非常“美丽”，无女主，配角CP（纯爱战神），智斗，乐子满满，欢愉！
脑洞很大的作者（这算是脑洞吧？），有些片段挺感人的，也有很多很搞笑的片段，整体看下来都挺棒的。很多角色都很有记忆点，非常不错，但有些早期花了许多笔墨勾勒的小伙伴在后期就没多少戏份了，略有点可惜。
虽然我没掉san（已经过了会被这些文字冲击到的年纪了），但看着段评里各种掉san的书友，真是太有乐子了[吃瓜][奸笑]
安歌还是太超模了，欢愉神选（无误"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768219454,"group_id":"7486442171579501630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢写点不同设定，未知会不会真的开始写作。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/HfUJIYQrysEoNNjIGk+/ss7c323hf3u7iY02hYAqmL","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"3046089817852135","user_name":"摩羯的狂想"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3046089817852135","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486442171579501630","book_info":{"abstract":"【这是一个癫狂的世界！】【克苏鲁向】【小心，本文带有极其强烈的精神污染，谨慎观看。】

e,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7520668970918167320","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"世界宏达，想象力十足，很久没看到这么吸引人的书了。作者描绘出了一个荒诞绝望的世界，偏偏在作者明快的笔力下没有完全的压抑，反而拥有触底反弹的希望。
许多人并没有放弃，真正的强者在尽各自的努力为人类找寻最后的生机。靖安城的高层们，尤其是大仲裁和裁决官们即便被神恩的力量扭曲却一直坚守着底线和责任心，非常让人敬佩。
神明并不关心人类，一切向神明借助的力量都是扭曲的饮鸩止渴，只有人类的意志才是人类真正的“救赎”。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751052457,"group_id":"7486442171579501630","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyxXJew6qn9vr396H1eTaNL5N81CznRG+k6f9y+lspQD","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b459217c8740495e8729a4d65a5d795f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787375&x-signature=5esjYRnrX53D1cYEvx8fdx7CpbE%3D","user_id":"1889429257198491","user_name":"一只奇毅果呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1889429257198491","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1760427217,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":25,"name":"游戏入侵","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/3ffa7b78adea11578ffcd90f16b6e61e~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/3ffa7b78adea11578ffcd90f16b6e61e~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486442171579501630","book_info":{"abstract":"【这是一个癫狂的世界！】【克苏鲁向】【小心，本文带有极其强烈的精神污染，谨慎观看。】
